name: Khazna
description: Egyptian financial super-app with APIs for payroll, credit, and embedded payments expanding into Saudi Arabia.

seo.title: Khazna — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Khazna: Egyptian financial super-app with APIs for payroll, credit, and embedded payments expanding into Saudi Arabia.

when_to_use: Embedded payroll and wage access payments for Egyptian enterprise
Consumer credit and BNPL API for Egyptian fintech and commerce apps
Digital wallet and payments super-app API for MENA market products
Expanding payment infrastructure from Egypt to Saudi Arabia via API

pros: Financial super-app with payroll and credit APIs
Strong Egypt presence with KSA expansion
cons: APIs less mature than pure-play gateways
Coverage still anchored to Egypt and KSA
review.verdict: Interesting for embedded finance plays in Egypt and Saudi — not a pure payments gateway choice.
review.best_for: Employers and fintechs embedding payroll or lending in MENA
review.not_for: Global merchants just needing card acceptance
